title: Color calibration system for rgb light device and method thereof
abstract: The present disclosure provides a color calibration system for an RGB light device and a related method. The system includes the RGB light device, a terminal device, and a detecting device. The terminal device is configured to control the RGB light device to emit three-color light at a rated maximum luminous flux. The detecting device is configured to detect an actual maximum luminous flux of the three-color light emitted by the RGB light device. The terminal device is connected with the RGB light device and the detecting device, respectively. The RGB light device is further configured to determine a pulse width modulation (PWM) duty ratio of the three-color light according to the rated maximum luminous flux and the actual maximum luminous flux, thereby ensuring consistency of color and brightness of the RGB light device.
